## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes (`.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`)
- [ ] `ruff check` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Unit tests still run offline (no live Google/Hermes required)
- [ ] No tokens, secrets, or PII logged
- [ ] User-facing changes noted in `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
